{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231846392484B57DA4F029DA4CE1"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7607166570173383486","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看非常喜欢五星好评"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771195904,"group_id":"7598073813720386585","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8P1nXRYoYcZtMiYiQjexMCdIbXciWl84OdKhOb5/KsB","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1411398032696040","user_name":"爱吃口蘑鲍汁的张天魁"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1411398032696040","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7598073813720386585","book_info":{"abstract":"【科举+架空+微轻松】　
　　　一朝穿越，身为孤儿的顾文远成了大盛朝松泉村一个世代种田人家最小的儿子。
　　屈服命运，和顾家其他人一样老实本分，从此做个在土地里讨生活的农民。
　　不！
　　顾文远决定握紧唯一的登天梯——科举！
　　运用智慧帮助一贫如洗的家中富裕，爹娘拿出钱财让这个最疼爱的小儿子读书。
　　最后连中三元，名动天下。
　　查贪官，推新政。
　　成了皇帝手下的栋梁之臣，之后更是扶摇直上。
　　成就宰辅之位。
　　皇帝：爱卿可不要闲着了，这儿还有几个决策要与爱卿一同商量。
　　六部尚书：你这能力，显得我们很废物啊！
　　要不要这么卷！
　　太子：先生是我的老师，也是我最尊敬的人。
　　简介无力，请移步正文。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oe58bf058f96a7393d783a7b9eefff0ae~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"纯阳宫的夏雨荷","author_id":"","book_id":"7598073813720386585","book_name":"科举连中三元，这个状元有亿点强","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3805人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7598073943680893465","read_count":"3805","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"241616"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"101","tags":"历史古代,历史,架空,穿越,科举","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oe58bf058f96a7393d783a7b9eefff0ae~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446799&x-signature=3bDQ080pmuXJTqLYlLAnd%2FmISDs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"314886812598611","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"50"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231846392484B57DA4F029DA4CE1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":12202,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15288,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":102},"user_action":{"auth
